request_debug.prompt_preview:
You are the final consolidation step in a startup slopmortem pipeline. Earlier stages compared a fresh pitch against several historical startup failures and produced per-failure lessons. Your job: pick and rank the lessons that actually apply to THIS pitch, dedup paraphrases, and explain why each applies.

Rules:
- Only consolidate lessons from the input list. Do NOT invent new risks. If a theme spans multiple lessons, write one canonical summary covering them.
- Drop lessons that do not apply t

response.text: {"top_risks":[{"summary":"Build creator monetization tools before scale or face creator exodus and collapse.","applies_because":"The pitch is an ad-supported B2C social app relying on user-generated 30-second voice notes; without revenue share or tipping, creators have no incentive to stay as the platform grows.","raised_by":["vine::social_communication","yo::social_communication"],"severity":"high"},{"summary":"Activate ad monetization before the viral spike fades or you will run out of runway.","applies_because":"The pitch explicitly relies on ad-supported revenue; the app is already viral in college towers, meaning the hype window is open now and must be monetized before it closes.","raised_by":["vine::social_communication","yo::social_communication","path::social_communication"],"severity":"high"},{"summary":"Prove advertiser demand for audio-only, location-tagged ad inventory before assuming CPMs will sustain the business.","applies_because":"The pitch is ad-supported and audio-only; audio inventory is less proven than video CPMs, and a niche high-intimacy social graph may command CPMs too low to cover unit economics.","raised_by":["vine::social_communication","path::social_communication"],"severity":"high"},{"summary":"Establish a structural moat now; the 30-second location-tagged voice note is trivially copyable by TikTok or Instagram.","applies_because":"The pitch's core format — 30-second voice notes from a single recurring location — is a thin constraint that well-resourced incumbents can ship as a feature update.","raised_by":["vine::social_communication","yo::social_communication","path::social_communication"],"severity":"high"},{"summary":"Design a clear generalisation path beyond college towers before location-anchored virality becomes a ceiling.","applies_because":"The pitch explicitly names college towers as the viral wedge; Vine and Path both showed that a tight seed community that cannot expand becomes an existential ceiling.","raised_by":["vine::social_communication","path::social_communication"],"severity":"medium"},{"summary":"Build a daily retention loop beyond the novelty of location-anchored voice notes.","applies_because":"The pitch's core mechanic is a single recurring location voice note, which is a novelty-driven behaviour with no described return trigger after week one.","raised_by":["yo::social_communication","path::social_communication"],"severity":"medium"},{"summary":"Harden privacy and security around audio posts tied to physical locations before launch at scale.","applies_because":"The pitch ties user audio to a specific recurring physical location, creating higher privacy stakes than typical social apps; an early exploit or FTC action could destroy trust.","raised_by":["yo::social_communication","path::social_communication"],"severity":"medium"},{"summary":"Ensure growth is not dependent on a single platform API or distribution channel.","applies_because":"The pitch targets college towers virality, which likely relies on app-store or social-platform distribution; a single API change or policy block could eliminate CAC control.","raised_by":["vine::social_communication","path::social_communication"],"severity":"medium"},{"summary":"Keep the location-lock constraint intact; removing the core differentiator to chase growth destroys identity.","applies_because":"The pitch's differentiating feature is the single recurring location constraint; pressure to relax it to grow beyond college towers mirrors Path and Vine's fatal format dilutions.","raised_by":["yo::social_communication","path::social_communication"],"severity":"medium"},{"summary":"Lock in community density in the college-tower seed before going broad.","applies_because":"The pitch names college towers as the current viral base; expanding prematurely destroys the social-graph density that makes the product valuable, as both Yo and Path demonstrated.","raised_by":["yo::social_communication","path::social_communication"],"severity":"low"}],"injection_detected":false}
